title: Position Boost Day 3 (Phase 13C.4)
note: 8 pages in positions 8-50 identified for position boosts. Focus: intro clarity, FAQ expansion, internal link strengthening, and calculator connections.

boosts.changes: Added 'Key Takeaways' section at top with 3 bullet points. Expanded FAQ section from 3 to 5 questions. Added internal link to mortgage-affordability calculator. Strengthened EEAT signals with Federal Reserve source attribution.
Added data-driven intro with exact rate figures. Added 3 contextual links: mortgage-calculator, mortgage-affordability, and rent-vs-buy decision page. Added 'What This Means for You' section.

Added 2 more competitors to comparison (Rocket Mortgage, Chase). Expanded FAQ from 3 to 6 questions. Added 'When to Use Each Calculator' scenario matrix. Added internal link to mortgage-affordability calculator.

Added specific dollar examples to intro. Strengthened internal links to credit-card-payoff and debt-payoff calculators. Added 'Real Example: Paying Off $10K in Credit Card Debt' section with step-by-step breakdown.
Added 3 detailed calculation examples with different income levels. Added 'Common Mistakes to Avoid' section. Linked to mortgage-calculator and compare-best-mortgage-calculator.
Added compound interest growth table showing $100/mo over 10/20/30 years. Expanded FAQ from 3 to 5 questions. Added internal links to investment-return and retirement-planning calculators.
Added 'Real-World Compound Interest Examples' section below calculator. Linked to 3 related blog posts. Added FAQ section with 5 common compound interest questions.
Added 'How Lenders Calculate Affordability' explainer section. Added DTI ratio explanation. Linked to 4 related guides. Added 'Affordability by Income Level' reference table.
